name: juliancanaless-obsidian-axiom-cortex
description: Obsidian plugin for graph-based knowledge synthesis powered by LightRAG. OAuth bridge (Antigravity, Copilot, Anthropic, Gemini CLI, OpenAI     Codex) with reactive token refresh, multi-step note synthesis with clickable citations, and proactive link discovery. Fork of Neural Composer + pi-mono auth.
